reviews.review_description:
This is in comparison to DOWNSHOT vr.
Pros:
-great physics system
-realistic player grabbing
-barely any bugs
-no lag
Cons:
-punching is overpowered
-sometimes crashes
-immortal bug
Suggestions:
-double barrel shotgun
-mini gun
-rpg
-grenade and grenade launcher
-throwing knife
-house level
-breakables
-zombie infection gamemode
-skin customization
-gun attachments
-more props
-eatable props
-healing items
-better ai and ai physics
-portal gun
Overall great game

Update: to be honest, the only thing wrong with this game is the combat. Stabbing feels weird, punching is way too op, and npcтАЩs are pretty much immortal. Next update definitely should be focused on solving these problems rather than adding something new.

I saw footage of this game and thought тАЬwow this looks really goodтАЭ I really wanted to get the game and I eventually did. My first play through was not what I thought it would be

When k first got in the game I was facing the wrong direction of where the menu is supposed to be but it was really no worry

The menu looked lazy and again, this is something that didnтАЩt really bother me but it could use some work to pull newer players into enjoying their game

Loading into the park I see that the graphics look good. Not intense but still really good

The guns felt very janky and difficult to use. Also the force grab is very hard to use as well but something people could get used to.

This game also would not let me invite any friends. Not sure if itтАЩs normal due to the fact no one was playing.

At some point while using the guns. It got to the point to it shot but in spring action(where you have to pull the charge handle forthe gun after every shot) and  tried to respawn the gun or use a different one and it just kept happening. Later I just got off for the day and was kinda disappointed 

I hope you guys could use this review as a way to make the game a lot better than it is now. And I also get that this game was just released and is bound to have bugs but I really want people to have a better first impression on this game because based of my first experience. Not sure if it was the best

Hope you use this. Have a good day/afternoon/night

Edit:
Nervbox is a pretty simple game, combining GMOD and BONELAB (sound effects and multiplayer from gmod, vr, physics and controls from bonelab). With the number of bugs, I sadly cannot recommend to buy this for 15$ right now. However, this is an early access game, and it's understandable to have these bugs (and lack of maps) in a beta game. It is however still a fun game, but the main problem is the low amount of active players. Buying it now is still a great fun when players are around.
Great idea but the game is so insanely buggy that itтАЩs unplayable

developer_response.body:
Hey there, sorry about the bugs! 
We just released an update that should resolve a majority of the problems that players have been experiencing. Please let us know how it affects your experience!

reviews.review_description: Fulfilled with fun and has multiplayer and make you laugh every time you join a new lobby 10/10 must recommend

ItтАЩs a fun, battle game which you can make small things like a flying trolley, you can fight and much more, however the game is obviously buggy as itтАЩs still in its beta stages. And unfortunately if you donтАЩt have any friends that have the game itтАЩs quite boring really, other than that, itтАЩs really fun but 11 pounds isnтАЩt the best price in my opinion. Would recommend  to anyone who has seen or liked bone lab fusion, or just genuinely wants to fight with friends or random people, whether itтАЩs by using a gravity gun to pick up a whole shovel and send it flying at there face, or picking up a shotgun and one pumping that mf. Hope you enjoy the game.

i used to play this game a lot and i had lots of fun, although there were many people who argued with me i still played, i am rating it 4 stars cause now when i look for lobbies there are no public lobbies for me to play in so i am just left alone. this was still a very good game and i recommend it to players who are looking for a good multiplayer physics game
